frames.description: The frame shows a street scene in an urban area. A white mini truck is parked on the left side of the road next to a yellow wall adorned with posters. A blue and white metal railing runs along the sidewalk. In the background, there is an old multi-story building and some trees. A white car is partially visible on the right edge.
frames.signs: A yellow sign on the wall reads 'নেশামুক্তি কেন্দ্র' (Nesh Mukti Kendra - Addiction Treatment Center) and 'মদ ছাড়ান' (Mod Chharan - Quit Alcohol). It also mentions 'ডাঃ বি. বি.' (Dr. B. B.).
frames.vehicles: White mini truck, white car (partially visible).
frames.pedestrians: One person is seen near the mini truck on the left.
frames.infrastructure: Blue and white railing, street lights, old buildings, trees, overhead wires.
frames.motion: The camera appears to be moving or panning to the right.
frames.occluded_signs: Signs on the wall are partially occluded by the blue and white railing and the parked mini truck.

frames.description: Continuing the rightward pan, the frame features a bright yellow building with distinctive arched windows and wooden shutters. More posters are plastered on the lower part of the wall behind the blue and white railing.
frames.signs: Several small posters are visible; one red poster has text that is difficult to read but appears to be a greeting or announcement in Bengali.
frames.vehicles: None visible.
frames.pedestrians: One person is standing near a tree on the sidewalk.
frames.infrastructure: Yellow building with arched windows and shutters, street light, blue and white railing, trees.
frames.motion: Scene has moved right from the previous frame.
frames.occluded_signs: Lower parts of the posters are obstructed by the railing and low-lying vegetation.

frames.description: The view shifts further right, showing a man on a bicycle crossing an intersection. A traffic light and a blue trash bin are visible near the curb.
frames.signs: A blue trash bin has a logo and text 'Sree Guru'. Small posters on the wall remain visible.
frames.vehicles: Man on a bicycle, a white car is visible in the background at the intersection.
frames.pedestrians: The man on the bicycle.
frames.infrastructure: Traffic light signal (lights off/green not visible), blue trash bin, street pole with multiple lamps.
frames.motion: Continued movement to the right; the cyclist is moving across the frame.
frames.occluded_signs: Posters on the building are partially blocked by trees and the railing.

frames.description: The camera looks down a side street at a busy intersection. Several pedestrians are crossing the street using a zebra crossing. A school building is on the left corner.
frames.signs: A sign on the school building reads 'SHAMBAZAR SCHOOL' and '1855'. A red traffic signal is visible. There is a stall with a 'Sree Guru' sign.
frames.vehicles: A white van and a yellow taxi are seen driving down the street. The hood of the blue camera vehicle is visible at the bottom left.
frames.pedestrians: Several pedestrians are crossing the street.
frames.infrastructure: School building, street lights, overhead power lines, zebra crossing, traffic signals.
frames.motion: The scene shows active traffic and pedestrian movement at an intersection.
frames.occluded_signs: Signs on the distance buildings are occluded by trees and overhead wires.

frames.description: A large blue bus passes closely in front of the camera, obscuring most of the background.
frames.signs: The bus has text reading 'SINTHIMORE 30A ESPLANADE' and a religious phrase in Bengali 'ওঁ নমঃ শিবায়' (Om Namah Shivaya).
frames.vehicles: Large blue public transport bus.
frames.pedestrians: Passengers can be seen inside the bus through the windows.
frames.infrastructure: Trees and buildings are partially visible behind the bus.
frames.motion: The bus is moving quickly from left to right across the field of view.
frames.occluded_signs: The background buildings and any street signs are fully occluded by the passing bus.

frames.description: After the bus passes, the view reveals a pinkish building with decorative moldings and some small street-side stalls.
frames.signs: A small shop sign for 'DATTA GLASS' is visible. Various small posters and advertisements are on the walls.
frames.vehicles: A yellow taxi is parked on the side of the road.
frames.pedestrians: A few people are standing or walking near the stalls.
frames.infrastructure: Pink multi-story building, street stalls with yellow and blue tarps, blue and white railing.
frames.motion: The camera continues to move right along the street.
frames.occluded_signs: Stall signs are partially occluded by the blue and white railing.

frames.description: The frame shows an older building with striped paint and a blue bus stop sign. A small blue van is parked on the right.
frames.signs: A sign for 'AVENUE CAFE' is visible. A blue bus stop sign is on a pole. A 'WESTERN ENGG.' sign is on the side of a light blue van.
frames.vehicles: Light blue van (Maruti Omni model).
frames.pedestrians: None clearly visible.
frames.infrastructure: Older residential/commercial buildings, blue and white railing, street lamp posts.
frames.motion: Steady rightward movement.
frames.occluded_signs: Building wall signs are partially hidden by a tilted tree trunk.

frames.description: The camera looks down a narrow street lined with parked cars and older buildings with many trees.
frames.signs: A shop sign reads 'Sutanuti Dry Cleaner'. Another yellow sign is partially visible.
frames.vehicles: Yellow taxi, white car, and several other vehicles are parked along the narrow street.
frames.pedestrians: None visible.
frames.infrastructure: Narrow urban street, old buildings, dense tree canopy, overhead wires.
frames.motion: The camera is passing by the entrance to the narrow street.
frames.occluded_signs: Distant signs down the alley are occluded by cars and trees.

frames.description: The scene focuses on a faded yellow building with multiple levels of balconies and windows behind a blue railing.
frames.signs: Few non-distinctive posters are on the building's ground floor walls.
frames.vehicles: A yellow taxi is parked near the curb on the left.
frames.pedestrians: One person is seen walking on the sidewalk.
frames.infrastructure: Multi-story residential building, blue and white railing, street lights.
frames.motion: Continued movement along the main road.

frames.description: The view passes a large, plain multi-story building with many windows, some with laundry hanging out.
frames.signs: None visible.
frames.vehicles: A man on a bicycle is riding along the railing.
frames.pedestrians: A few people are seen near the building's base.
frames.infrastructure: Large apartment building, blue and white railing.
frames.motion: The cyclist is moving in the same direction as the camera.

frames.description: The frame shows a gated entrance to a property and a yellow wall with familiar posters.
frames.signs: The 'নেশামুক্তি কেন্দ্র' (Addiction Treatment Center) posters seen in earlier frames reappear on the wall.

frames.description: The camera passes more of the yellow wall and a building with a 'SBI' logo visible in the background.

frames.description: Another large blue bus with red lettering passes by, filling much of the frame.
frames.signs: The bus has a large advertisement for 'RAIPUR ELECT...' listing various locations. A small 'IAS UPSC' sign is on a street pole.

frames.description: The camera captures a modern white corner building at an intersection. Two buses are visible on either side.
frames.signs: A shop sign 'Sree Guru' is seen. Street markings on the road say 'LANE'. Shop signs are visible on the ground floor of the white building.

frames.pedestrians: The bus driver's arm is visible out the window.

frames.signs: A round sign reads 'BUSES WILL NOT STOP HERE' in red and white. There is also a small red circle with a cross inside.

frames.description: The view focuses on a wall with vertical stripes and several posters. A billboard is visible on top of the building.
frames.signs: The Anjali Jewellers billboard features a woman. A sign reads 'SAVE THE NUMBER 66011800'. A blue sign for 'SOLIDPLY' is also seen. A shop sign 'info more' is visible.

frames.description: The camera reaches a large intersection with several billboards and many auto-rickshaws waiting or moving.
frames.signs: A large billboard for 'Lux Cozi EXODUS COZY' features a woman. Another billboard for 'P.C. CHANDRA JEWELLERS' is visible. A traffic barrier says 'GO SLOW'. Traffic lights are visible. A green directional sign points toward various locations.

frames.motion: High activity level at a major intersection.
frames.occluded_signs: Distant directional signs are occluded by the mass of auto-rickshaws.

frames.description: The frame shows a gas station on the right side of the intersection, with a zebra crossing in the foreground.
frames.signs: The 'P.C. CHANDRA JEWELLERS' billboard is prominently displayed above the 'Bharat Petroleum' gas station. A blue and white sign for 'Lux Cozi' is on the left.
frames.vehicles: Several auto-rickshaws, a motorcycle, a white mini truck, and a white car at the gas station.
frames.pedestrians: A man is crossing the street on the zebra crossing.

frames.description: The camera passes a decorative sign installation and a medical shop near the gas station.
